About Pressed by Lyss

I’m Alyssa, I’ve been doing nails for 3 years. I started doing nails for myself because I was tired of the same nails at the dollar store and never being able to switch it up. My family started asking me to do their nails and now I have my own business. I can do anything you want!

My biggest motto has been:
“If you set your mind to it, you can do it”
